title: Tries, Prefix Search, and String Algorithms · Algorithm Workbench
summary: Build an autocomplete and route-prefix service with predictable matching behavior. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a Unicode-aware prefix index and matcher while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent shared prefixes, terminal markers, and child transitions without confusing words and prefixes.
Implement insert, exact lookup, prefix lookup, delete, and bounded suggestions.
Define Unicode normalization and case policy before indexing or comparison.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
